_note: Pre-baked search results for the GitHub Pages demo. Keyed by lowercase query.

matrix.title: The Matrix
matrix.description: A computer hacker discovers that reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines that built it.

matrix.title: The Matrix Reloaded
matrix.description: Neo and the rebel leaders race to save Zion as the machine army approaches.

matrix.title: The Matrix and Philosophy
matrix.description: Essays from 17 philosophers exploring free will, reality, and consciousness through the lens of the film.

dune.title: Dune
dune.description: A noble family becomes embroiled in a war for the most valuable substance in the universe on a desert planet.

dune.title: Dune: Part Two
dune.description: Paul Atreides unites with the Fremen to wage war against those who destroyed his family.

dune.title: Dune
dune.description: The defining science fiction epic — ecology, religion, politics, and power on a desert planet.

solaris.title: Solaris
solaris.description: A psychologist is sent to a space station orbiting a mysterious ocean planet where the crew has been experiencing hallucinations.

solaris.title: Solaris
solaris.description: Scientists attempt to study a living alien ocean that responds to their thoughts — and the limits of human understanding.
